scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install auto-scaling-configurator\\n  or /plugin install auto-scaling-configurator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
